items.final_wording: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

source.title: Thyroid disease: assessment and management
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with suspected or diagnosed thyroid disease, subject to recommendation-specific age and disease qualifiers.
source.setting: Assessment, investigation, treatment discussion, monitoring, and follow-up of thyroid disease.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected thyroid-testing, thyroid-enlargement warning, hypothyroidism-monitoring, and hyperthyroidism-monitoring documentation. Symptom diagnosis, medicine selection or dose, and UAE pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.6 — information and thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

items.rationale: Supports thyroid-enlargement warning-symptom and medicine-information context for post-thyroid surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

items.rationale: Supports postoperative wound infection-sign review for post-thyroid surgery follow-up; no decision is generated.
